Introducing our Multi-Functional Sleeper Chair: The Perfect Blend of Comfort, Style, and Practicality for Your Home

Experience unmatched versatility with our sleeper chair, designed to adapt seamlessly to your daily needs. Whether you’re curling up with a book, binge-watching your favorite show, or hosting overnight guests, this chair effortlessly transitions to keep you comfortable in every scenario.

**Versatile Comfort for Every Activity**
The five-way adjustable backrest lets you customize your relaxation experience with precision. Recline up to 180° to find the ideal angle—whether you prefer a slight tilt for reading, a deeper recline for TV viewing, or fully flat for a quick nap. No matter the activity, this chair ensures optimal support and comfort, making every moment spent in it truly enjoyable.

**Space-Saving Design for Small Living**
Perfect for apartments, studios, or any space-conscious home, this upholstered armchair combines sleek, modern style with exceptional functionality. When guests arrive, simply convert it into a cozy single bed in seconds—no complicated mechanisms required. The bed dimensions (183W x 98.5D x 26H cm) provide ample space for a restful night’s sleep, ensuring your guests feel right at home without sacrificing valuable floor space.

**Robust Construction Built to Last**
Crafted with durability in mind, the chair features a stable steel frame that guarantees long-term sturdiness, while non-slip feet prevent unwanted movement on any floor surface. The armrests, made from high-quality teak wood, add a touch of natural elegance to your decor and provide extra stability, ensuring the chair remains both functional and stylish for years to come.

**Ultimate Seating Comfort You’ll Love**
Sink into luxury with the chair’s velvety-soft fabric cover, which feels incredibly smooth against the skin. The generously padded seat and additional cushion work together to deliver incomparable softness and support, cradling your body and relieving pressure points—so you can relax for hours without discomfort.

**Product Specifications**
- **Chair Dimensions**: 102W x 73D x 81H cm (perfect for everyday seating)
- **Bed Dimensions**: 183W x 98.5D x 26H cm (spacious enough for a single adult)
- **Load Capacity**: 120 kg (sturdy enough to accommodate most users)
- **Assembly**: Required (easy-to-follow instructions included for quick setup)

products.detailHtml:
Indulge in the ultimate relaxation experience with our Cloud-Like Corduroy Modular Sofa, where comfort, style, and convenience converge to transform your living space. Sink into pure luxury as you settle onto this boneless sofa, expertly crafted with premium 32D foam that delivers instant softness and long-lasting support, mimicking the sensation of floating on a cloud. The thoughtfully designed curved backrest and generous 74cm deep seat work in harmony to cradle your body in the perfect posture, whether you’re unwinding after a long day, hosting movie nights with loved ones, or enjoying a peaceful afternoon nap. This versatile modular piece is more than just a sofa—it’s your personal oasis for deep relaxation.

Crafted for both elegance and practicality, the sofa is upholstered in velvety-soft corduroy fabric that feels luxuriously smooth against the skin while remaining breathable for year-round comfort. What truly sets it apart is its pet-friendly design: the scratch-resistant material stands up to playful pets, ensuring your sofa stays looking fresh and new even with furry friends around. Plus, cleaning is a breeze, giving you complete peace of mind. Adding a touch of sophistication, pearl-like piping adorns the edges, elevating the sofa’s aesthetic and making it a stylish focal point in any living room.

Forget the hassle of complicated assembly—this comfortable sofa is ready to enjoy right out of the box. Simply unpack, gently tap the modules to release the compressed foam, and start relaxing immediately. The sofa will gradually expand to its full size: reaching 80% of its shape within one week, 90% in one month, and 100% over time, ensuring optimal comfort and support as it settles. Please note that due to variations in lighting and screen settings, the actual color of the sofa may vary slightly, though rest assured it will maintain its rich, inviting appearance.

Experience the perfect blend of comfort, durability, and style—order yours today and transform your living room into a haven of relaxation.

Designed with both relaxation and functionality in mind, this sofa features an extra-wide seat measuring 181 cm, providing ample space to accommodate up to three people. Whether you’re hosting a movie night with friends, enjoying a game afternoon with family, or simply unwinding on a cozy Sunday, there’s plenty of room for everyone to stretch out and get comfortable.

Comfort is taken to the next level with generous padding throughout. The seat is luxuriously cushioned with 18 cm of high-quality foam, offering a supportive yet plush feel, while the backrest boasts 14 cm of padding (12.5 cm main padding plus structured support) for optimal relaxation. Need a convenient surface for snacks or drinks? The middle section of the backrest folds down to transform into a handy table, adding practicality to your lounging experience.

But the Dreisitzer doesn’t stop at being a sofa – it’s a multifunctional piece that adapts to your needs. With a simple conversion mechanism, it easily transforms into a spacious bed, perfect for accommodating overnight guests. The backrest also offers three adjustable recline positions (115°, 145°, and 180°), allowing you to customize your seating angle whether you’re reading, watching TV, or taking a nap.

Built to last, the sofa features a strong frame and solid wood feet, ensuring stability and durability for years to come. Its sleek Scandinavian design, characterized by clean lines and a timeless aesthetic, seamlessly complements any interior style, from modern to rustic.

Two cup holders: You can place your cups on both sides of the sofa, allowing you to drink coffee, water, and other beverages without getting up. The ridged design of the cup holder increases the stability of the cup and prevents it from tipping over.
products.detailHtml:
Indulge in the epitome of comfort and modern elegance with our luxurious, multi-functional sofa, designed to elevate any living space. Boasting overall dimensions of 202 cm × 137 cm × 80 cm, this sofa is not just a statement piece for your living room but also a versatile addition to bedrooms, offices, or any area where style and functionality meet.

Designed with your convenience in mind, the sofa features two integrated cup holders, strategically placed on both sides to keep your favorite beverages within arm’s reach. Whether you’re sipping coffee, water, or other drinks, you can relax without the need to起身. The cup holders’ corrugated design enhances stability, providing a secure spot for your cups and preventing accidental spills.

Stay connected and charged effortlessly with the sofa’s built-in power solutions: 2 integrated USB ports and 1 Type-C port. Perfect for charging smartphones, tablets, or other electronic devices while you unwind, this feature ensures you never have to cut your relaxation short to find a power outlet.

Adapting to your space and needs is seamless, thanks to the freely combinable ottoman included with this corner sofa. Whether you prefer a freestanding corner setup or an L-shaped configuration, the ottoman allows you to customize the layout to fit your room perfectly, offering flexibility for both small and large spaces.

**Important Note:** To ensure safe transportation, the sofa is compressed during packaging. After unpacking, you may notice some shrinkage—this is completely normal. Simply use a hair dryer on a low heat setting and expose the sofa to sunlight until it regains its fluffy, inviting shape.

Transform your living area into a haven of comfort and style with this modern, feature-packed sofa—where luxury meets practicality.
features: 2 integrated USB ports and 1 Type-C: For added convenience and comfort, this L-shaped, freely connectable sofa features two integrated USB charging ports and 1 Type-C port, allowing you to conveniently charge your electronic devices while on the sofa.
Freely combinable ottoman: This corner sofa comes with a freely combinable ottoman that can be flexibly adapted to your needs. This creates a freestanding corner sofa or L-shaped sofa.
Note: The sofa has been compressed and will shrink after disassembly. This is normal. You need to use a hair dryer and expose the sofa to the sun until it becomes fluffy again.

products.detailHtml:

Comfort takes center stage with thoughtfully designed cushions: the seat cushions are filled with high-density foam, providing a perfect balance of support and softness for hours of comfortable seating. The backrest, on the other hand, is stuffed with premium doll cotton, gently cradling your waist and offering a firm yet yielding feel—whether you're sitting upright to read, reclining to watch a movie, or lying down for a quick nap.

Built to last, the sofa bed boasts a robust wooden frame that guarantees exceptional stability and durability. This sturdy construction ensures the sofa can withstand daily use without compromising its structural integrity, making it a reliable addition to your home for years to come.

Versatility is key with this convertible sleeper sofa: the backrest adjusts effortlessly to recline backward, allowing you to find your ideal lounging position, and can be fully converted into a comfortable bed—perfect for accommodating overnight guests or creating a cozy spot for a restful night’s sleep. Practicality is never overlooked, thanks to two integrated side pockets. These handy storage solutions are ideal for keeping your essentials within arm’s reach—store books, magazines, remote controls, or even your phone, eliminating clutter and keeping your living space neat and organized.

Elevate your home with a piece that seamlessly combines style, comfort, and functionality. Whether you’re relaxing alone, entertaining friends, or hosting guests, this sofa bed is designed to adapt to your lifestyle, making it a must-have for any modern living space. Experience the perfect fusion of luxury and utility today!

products.detailHtml:

Available in two practical configurations – a simple 2-seater or a small 3-seater – it measures 207.5 x 80 x 87 cm, making it ideal for tight spaces while still providing ample seating. Choose from elegant beige or classic gray to effortlessly complement your existing furniture and decor, ensuring a seamless integration into any interior theme.

Designed with thoughtful details to enhance your daily life, this sofa combines comfort and convenience in every aspect. One side features a plush, comfortable headrest that cradles your neck and shoulders, perfect for unwinding after a long day, while the other side is equipped with a 270° rotating side table. Additionally, the armrest includes built-in storage space, ideal for keeping magazines, remote controls, or everyday items within arm’s reach, keeping your living area clutter-free and organized.

Simply pull the convenient handle to access these roomy storage areas, where you can neatly tuck away blankets, extra pillows, children’s toys, or other household utensils. This clever design ensures your living room remains tidy and cozy, with all your essentials stored out of sight but easily accessible when needed.

This luxurious material creates a warm and inviting atmosphere, making it the perfect spot for relaxing, cuddling with loved ones, or taking a quick nap. Whether you’re settling in for a movie night, reading a book, or simply enjoying a quiet moment, the Teddy plush cover provides a cozy and comfortable living experience you’ll never want to leave.

Adding to its appeal is the elegant, rounded design of the armrests, which feature gentle curves and are free of sharp edges. This not only gives the sofa a harmonious and stylish look but also enhances safety, making it suitable for homes with children or pets. The smooth lines and soft contours create an inviting, cozy atmosphere, transforming your living room into a welcoming retreat where you can unwind and recharge.

In summary, our sofa is more than just a seating option – it’s a functional, comfortable, and stylish piece of furniture designed to elevate your living space. With its space-saving design, thoughtful details, ample storage, luxurious Teddy plush cover, and elegant rounded aesthetic, it’s the perfect choice for anyone looking to combine practicality with comfort and style. Upgrade your home today with this versatile sofa and enjoy a more organized, cozy, and beautiful living environment.

products.detailHtml:
Indulge in the ultimate combination of style, comfort, and versatility with our meticulously crafted multi-seat sofa, designed to transform your living space into a hub of relaxation and connection.

**Spacious Multi-Seat Design for Every Occasion**
Boasting generous dimensions of 220 cm × 194 cm × 85 cm, this sofa offers ample room to accommodate 3-5 people simultaneously, ensuring everyone can gather without feeling cramped. Whether you’re hosting a lively family gathering, enjoying a casual dinner with friends, or unwinding alone with a book, its expansive design adapts seamlessly to your needs. The thoughtful layout encourages togetherness while providing enough space for each person to relax comfortably, making it the perfect centerpiece for both social events and quiet evenings.

**Premium Fabric for Durability and Comfort**
Crafted from selected breathable cotton and linen fabric, the sofa delivers a luxuriously soft feel against the skin, ensuring maximum comfort during extended use. This high-quality material is not only gentle but also highly wear-resistant and pill-free, guaranteeing long-lasting performance even in busy households. Additionally, the fabric’s easy-to-clean and low-maintenance properties make it ideal for everyday life—simply wipe away spills or dust, and it will retain its fresh, new look for years to come.

**High-Quality Materials for Superior Support**
The sofa’s construction is a testament to durability and ergonomic design. It features a premium filling of independent pocket springs paired with high-elastic sponge, creating a three-dimensional support structure that conforms to your body’s natural curves. Each independent pocket spring provides targeted support to every contact point, while the high-resilience sponge adds an extra layer of cushioning. This dynamic combination effectively relieves pressure from prolonged sitting, reduces muscle fatigue, and prevents sagging or deformation over time, ensuring the sofa maintains its shape and comfort for years.

**Cloud-Like Comfort with Plush Fillings**
Every detail is designed for comfort, starting with the back cushions and pillows, which are filled with premium PP cotton. Known for its excellent fluffiness and resilience, PP cotton offers a soft, yet supportive feel that cradles your body as you lean back to read, take a nap, or simply relax. Whether you’re curling up with a movie or enjoying a lazy afternoon, the sofa’s plush cushions add a touch of coziness that makes every moment feel like a retreat.

**Flexible Design to Suit Your Space**
The sofa’s innovative movable footrest configuration sets it apart, allowing you to switch effortlessly between U-shaped and L-shaped layouts to match your room’s dimensions. The ottoman can be easily repositioned to extend the chaise longue, creating a private relaxation nook for unwinding after a long day. Alternatively, it can be separated and used as a standalone footrest, offering even more versatility. This adaptability makes it perfect for apartments, houses, or any space where flexibility is key—no matter your layout, this sofa will fit seamlessly.

Elevate your living experience with a sofa that combines functionality, durability, and unmatched comfort. Whether you’re entertaining guests or enjoying quiet moments at home, this piece is designed to be the heart of your living space. Invest in quality, versatility, and style—order yours today and transform your home into a haven of relaxation!

products.detailHtml:
Introducing our versatile and stylish two-seater sofa bed, the perfect addition to any living space that seamlessly combines functionality, comfort, and modern design.

**Versatile Design for Every Need**
Transform this sofa into a cozy guest bed in just a few simple steps, making it ideal for accommodating overnight visitors or creating a relaxing spot for afternoon naps. The generous lying area measures 191 cm in length, providing ample space for a restful night’s sleep, ensuring your guests feel right at home.

**Maximum Comfort You’ll Love**
Experience unparalleled seating and lying comfort, thanks to the thoughtfully crafted design. The breathable fabric cover promotes air circulation, keeping you cool and comfortable even during extended use, while the thick foam padding offers a soft, supportive surface. Sturdy backrest and additional cushions enhance relaxation, whether you’re sitting or lying down. Beneath the surface, durable metal springs work to maintain the sofa bed’s shape over time, delivering optimal suspension and long-lasting resilience.

**Adjustable Backrest for Custom Relaxation**
Tailor your comfort with the adjustable backrest, which locks securely in three different positions—up to a maximum angle of 180°. Whether you’re unwinding with a book, watching TV, or simply taking a break, you can easily find the perfect angle to suit your mood and activity, making this sofa bed as functional as it is comfortable.

**Robust Construction for Stability & Style**
Built to last, the sofa bed features solid beech wood legs that provide exceptional stability and durability, ensuring you can relax with complete peace of mind. Its sleek, modern design not only adds a touch of elegance to your living room, bedroom, or home office but also complements a wide range of decor styles, from contemporary to classic.

**Key Dimensions & Details**
- **Sofa Dimensions**: 141L x 90W x 81H cm (perfect for smaller spaces while offering ample seating)
- **Lying Area**: 191L x 141W x 27H cm (spacious enough for a comfortable night’s sleep)
- **Maximum Load**: 120 kg (sturdy enough to support daily use)
- **Assembly**: Required (easy-to-follow instructions included for quick setup)

Elevate your living space with a sofa bed that blends practicality, comfort, and style. Whether you need extra sleeping space for guests or a flexible seating solution for your daily routine, this versatile piece is designed to meet all your needs.
features: Adjustable backrest: Lock the backrest of this double sleeper sofa in three different positions up to a maximum angle of 180°, ideal for relaxing, watching TV, reading or simply unwinding.

products.detailHtml:
Indulge in the perfect blend of comfort, versatility, and durability with our exquisite L-shaped sofa, designed to elevate your living space and cater to all your relaxation needs. Crafted with meticulous attention to detail, this sofa seamlessly combines classic aesthetics with modern functionality, making it an ideal addition to any home or office.

Wrapped in premium classic corduroy fabric, the sofa offers a luxuriously soft and skin-friendly touch that feels gentle against your skin. Not only does this material exude timeless charm, but it also boasts exceptional durability—even after prolonged use, it maintains a comfortably grippy texture, ensuring you stay cozy without the discomfort of moisture buildup. Beneath the surface, the sofa is filled with high-resilience elastic foam that delivers robust support and rapid recovery, preventing sagging and ensuring the seating remains plush and inviting for years to come. Say goodbye to lumpy cushions and hello to long-lasting comfort that retains its shape, no matter how often you relax on it.

One of the standout features of this sofa is its convertible chaise longue side, which can be effortlessly adjusted to either the left or right, giving you the freedom to customize the layout according to your room size and personal preference. Whether you want to create a serene lying area for afternoon naps, a cozy spot to stretch out with a book, or simply add extra seating for guests, this flexible design adapts to your needs, helping you optimize your space with ease.

To enhance both comfort and style, the sofa comes complete with 6 decorative pillows included in the delivery. These pillows not only provide additional support for your back and neck, making movie nights or casual lounging even more enjoyable, but they also serve as charming decorative accents. Arrange them to your liking, mix and match textures, or change their positions to refresh the look of your sofa—adding a personal touch and a warm, inviting atmosphere to your living room.

Versatility is at the heart of this sofa, making it suitable for a wide range of spaces. It shines as the main seating area in spacious living rooms, where it can accommodate family gatherings, game nights, or lazy weekends watching TV. For apartments with limited space, its compact L-shape maximizes seating without overwhelming the room. Even in offices, it serves as a comfortable relaxation zone for quick breaks, helping you recharge during a busy workday. No matter the environment, this sofa provides ample space for multiple people, ensuring everyone can sit back, relax, and enjoy quality time together.

Stability and practicality are ensured by the sturdy plastic legs that support the entire sofa. These legs are designed to be quiet and non-slip, preventing annoying squeaks when the sofa is moved and protecting your floors—whether wooden, tile, or laminate—from unsightly scratches. Additionally, they are highly abrasion-resistant and corrosion-resistant, guaranteeing long-term durability and reliable stability, so you can enjoy your sofa with peace of mind for years to come.

Transform your living space into a haven of comfort and style with this versatile, durable, and beautifully designed L-shaped sofa. It’s more than just a piece of furniture—it’s a place where memories are made, relaxation is prioritized, and everyday moments become more enjoyable.

products.detailHtml:
Transform your living space into a haven of comfort, versatility, and style with our premium sofa—designed to elevate every moment, from workdays to lazy weekends and everything in between.

**Independently Adjustable Double Backrest for Ultimate Flexibility**
Experience personalized comfort like never before with our independently adjustable double backrests. Each backrest can be separately adjusted to 3 fixed angles: sit upright for focused work or meals, lean back for relaxed reading or TV time, or lie completely flat to convert the sofa into a spacious sleeping surface in seconds. Whether you need a cozy spot for an afternoon nap, a temporary bed for overnight guests, or a versatile lounging area, this sofa adapts effortlessly to your needs.

**Sumptuous Premium Velvet Upholstery**
Crafted from high-density, abrasion-resistant velvet, this sofa combines luxury with durability. The fabric boasts a silky-smooth texture that feels delightfully soft against the skin, while its dirt-repellent and colorfast properties ensure it stays looking fresh and vibrant even with daily use. Perfect for families, pet owners, or anyone seeking a blend of elegance and practicality, the velvet upholstery adds a touch of sophistication to any decor.

**Sturdy Gold-Plated Metal Feet for Stability & Style**
Supported by six stable gold-colored metal feet, this sofa is built to last. With a weight capacity of over 150 kg, it provides reliable stability for daily use, while the scratch-resistant design protects your floors from damage. The sleek metal feet, paired with modern metal details, infuse your living room with an elegant, subtly luxurious aesthetic—making it a statement piece that complements both contemporary and classic interiors.

**Ergonomic High-Density Foam for Unmatched Comfort**
Sink into cloud-like comfort with our ergonomically designed high-density foam filling. The highly elastic foam conforms perfectly to your back and lumbar vertebrae, offering optimal support for long hours of sitting or lying. Unlike traditional sofas, this foam remains permanently dimensionally stable, ensuring a consistent, mattress-like feel that never loses its shape—so you can enjoy lasting comfort for years to come.

**Hidden Storage Space for Clutter-Free Living**
Maximize your living area with the sofa’s practical hidden storage solution. Thanks to its 24 cm high legs, a vacuum robot can easily glide underneath for effortless cleaning, keeping your space dust-free. The increased ground clearance also provides ample room to store books, slippers, blankets, or other everyday items, making it ideal for small apartments or anyone looking to keep their living space neat and organized.

Elevate your home with a sofa that marries functionality, comfort, and style. Whether you’re working, relaxing, hosting guests, or simply enjoying a quiet evening, this piece is designed to enhance every aspect of your daily life. Order now and discover the perfect blend of luxury and practicality!
features: Gilded metal feet: Equipped with six stable gold-effect metal feet – load-bearing up to over 150 kg, scratch-resistant and particularly stable. Combined with modern metal details, the design gives the living room a stylish touch with a subtle luxury look.

Ergonomic High-Density Foam: Filled with highly elastic foam that adapts optimally to the back and lumbar vertebrae area. Permanently dimensionally stable, even when sitting or lying for a long time – for a lying feeling like on a high-quality mattress.

products.detailHtml:
Elevate Your Living Space with Our Minimalist Modular Sectional Sofa Set

Introducing our Modern Modular Sectional Sofa Set—a perfect blend of timeless design and everyday functionality, crafted to transform your living room into a stylish, inviting hub for relaxation and connection. Designed with clean lines and a sleek, minimalist silhouette, this sofa prioritizes understated elegance, allowing it to seamlessly complement any home decor—from contemporary to classic. The premium fabric not only adds a touch of sophistication but also ensures durability, making it a chic and long-lasting centerpiece for your space.

Comfort takes center stage with this reversible sofa set, featuring a plush, spacious seating area that invites you to unwind after a long day. Wrapped in soft, breathable terrycloth fabric, the sofa feels gentle against the skin, while its high-density sponge structure provides exceptional support and resilience. Whether you’re curling up with a book, hosting a movie night, or simply lounging, the combination of comfort and durability ensures this sofa stands up to daily use—no sacrificing coziness for longevity.

Designed with versatility in mind, this modular sofa is more than just a seating solution—it adapts to your lifestyle. Mix and match the individual sections to create a configuration that fits your space, whether you need a compact setup for a small apartment or a sprawling arrangement for family gatherings. The straight-cut edges and elegant, welcoming aesthetic make it visually appealing, while the extra-wide seating offers ample room for family and friends to stretch out and relax. It’s not just furniture; it’s a space where memories are made.

Perfect for any room in your home, this multipurpose sofa set shines in living rooms, apartments, bedrooms, guest rooms, and even children’s rooms. Its durable construction can handle the energy of kids jumping and playing, ensuring it remains a staple in your home for years to come. Plus, its compact design means no attic space is wasted—store extra sections easily when not in use.

Moving? No problem. Each piece of this modular sofa is lightweight and easy to maneuver individually, making it a breeze to navigate tight doorways, narrow hallways, or awkward staircases. Say goodbye to the stress of relocating bulky furniture—this sofa adapts to your journey, just as it adapts to your space.

Upgrade your home with a sofa that combines style, comfort, and flexibility. Our Minimalist Modular Sectional Sofa Set isn’t just furniture—it’s a statement of modern living, designed to grow with you and enhance every moment spent at home.

products.detailHtml:
Introducing our versatile and stylish sofa bed, designed to elevate your living space with exceptional comfort, functionality, and modern flair. Whether you're seeking a cozy spot to unwind after a long day, accommodating overnight guests, or maximizing space in a smaller home, this sofa bed delivers on every front.

**Independently Adjustable Backrests for Custom Comfort**
Experience personalized relaxation with not one, but two independently adjustable backrests. Each backrest offers three distinct levels of adjustment, allowing you to effortlessly switch between sitting upright for work or conversation, reclining slightly for reading or TV, or lying flat for a quick nap. And when you need extra sleeping space, converting the sofa to bed mode is a breeze—simply use the intuitive single handle to smoothly transition, ensuring seamless functionality for both daily use and unexpected guests.

**Luxurious High-Quality Velvet Cover**
Sink into the softness of our premium velvet cover, crafted for both durability and comfort. The surface boasts a remarkably fine, skin-friendly texture that feels gentle against your skin, making every seating experience a delight. Not only does this velvet resist stains, but it’s also incredibly easy to care for, ensuring your sofa looks fresh and inviting even with daily use. Its timeless appeal adds a touch of elegance to any decor, from modern minimalist to cozy traditional styles.

**Supportive High-Density Foam Padding**
The seat is generously filled with high-density foam that maintains its shape and support, even after years of use. Ergonomically designed to conform to your body’s natural contours, it provides optimal lumbar support and reduces pressure points, offering a cloud-like seating experience that you’ll never want to leave. Whether you’re hosting a movie night or enjoying a quiet evening, this padding ensures long-lasting comfort without sacrificing stability.

**Thoughtful Space-Saving Foldable Design**
Maximize your living space with our clever foldable armrests, which can be easily lowered by 45° to create a convenient storage solution for the included cushions. No more cluttered corners—simply tuck the cushions away when not in use, keeping your space neat and organized. Additionally, the sofa features high feet that allow a vacuum robot to glide effortlessly underneath, simplifying cleaning and ensuring no dust or debris is left behind. The space under the sofa also serves as extra storage for blankets, books, or seasonal items, making it perfect for small apartments or rooms where space is at a premium.

Combining practicality, style, and unmatched comfort, this sofa bed is more than just a piece of furniture—it’s a versatile addition to your home that adapts to your lifestyle. Upgrade your living experience today!

products.detailHtml:
Transform Your Living Space with Our Premium Adjustable Velvet Sofa – Where Comfort, Style, and Functionality Meet!

**Independently Adjustable Double Backrest for Ultimate Versatility**
Experience personalized comfort like never before with our independently adjustable double backrest design. Each backrest can be easily adjusted into 3 fixed positions to suit your needs: sit upright for focused work or reading, recline into a relaxed angle for movie nights, or lie completely flat to create a spacious sleeping surface in seconds. Perfect for overnight guests, afternoon naps, or simply stretching out, this sofa seamlessly adapts to your daily activities, making it the ultimate multitasking centerpiece for your home.

**Luxurious Premium Velvet: Soft, Durable, and Timeless**
Crafted from high-density, abrasion-resistant velvet, this sofa boasts a sumptuously silky texture that feels incredibly soft to the touch. Not only does it exude elegance, but the premium fabric is also dirt-repellent and colorfast, ensuring it stays looking fresh and vibrant even with daily use. Whether you’re entertaining guests or unwinding after a long day, the velvet upholstery adds a touch of sophistication to any decor, elevating your living room with its rich, inviting appeal.

**Sturdy Gilded Metal Feet for Stability and Style**
Supported by six stable metal feet in a sleek gold finish, this sofa combines durability with modern charm. Engineered to bear over 150 kg, these scratch-resistant feet provide exceptional stability, ensuring safety and longevity. The gold accents, paired with subtle metal details, add a hint of luxury to your space, creating a refined look that blends seamlessly with both contemporary and classic interiors.

**Ergonomic High-Density Foam for Unmatched Comfort**
Sink into cloud-like comfort with our high-density elastic foam filling, designed to perfectly conform to your back and lumbar vertebrae. This ergonomic support ensures proper posture, reducing strain during long hours of sitting or lying. The foam is permanently dimensionally stable, maintaining its shape and firmness even with daily use, so you can enjoy a lying experience that rivals a high-quality mattress—ideal for lazy weekends or cozy evenings.

**Hidden Storage Space: Smart Solutions for Small Rooms**
Maximize your living area with the practical hidden storage space underneath the sofa. Thanks to the 24 cm high legs, a vacuum robot can effortlessly glide underneath for easy cleaning, keeping your space dust-free. The increased ground clearance also provides ample room to store books, slippers, blankets, or other everyday items, helping you keep your living room clutter-free and organized—perfect for apartments or smaller homes where space is precious.

Elevate your home with a sofa that doesn’t just look beautiful but works harder for you. Combining adjustability, luxury, and functionality, this piece is more than furniture—it’s a lifestyle upgrade. Order now and discover the perfect blend of comfort and style!

products.detailHtml:
Transform your living space into a versatile haven of comfort and style with our premium sofa, designed to elevate every moment of relaxation, work, and even overnight stays.

**Independently Adjustable Double Backrest for Ultimate Versatility**
Experience unmatched flexibility with two independently adjustable backrests, each offering 3 fixed angles to suit your every need. Sit upright for focused work or lively conversations, lean back for a relaxed movie night, or lie completely flat to create a cozy sleeping surface—perfect for accommodating overnight guests or indulging in a midday nap. This seamless transformation ensures your sofa adapts effortlessly to your lifestyle, making it more than just seating—it’s a multi-functional centerpiece.

**Luxurious Premium Velvet Fabric**
Crafted from high-density, abrasion-resistant velvet, this sofa boasts a sumptuously silky texture that feels incredibly soft to the touch. Not only does it exude elegance, but its durable construction also ensures long-lasting beauty: the material is dirt-repellent, preventing stains from setting in, and colorfast, maintaining its rich hue even with daily use. Add a touch of sophistication to your home while enjoying the practical benefits of a fabric built for both comfort and resilience.

**Sturdy Gold-Plated Metal Feet for Stability & Style**
Elevate your decor with six stable gold-plated metal feet that combine functionality with luxury. These robust feet support a weight capacity of over 150 kg, ensuring the sofa remains steady and secure for years to come. Scratch-resistant by design, they protect your floors from damage, while modern metal details enhance the sofa’s sleek profile, infusing your living room with a subtle yet striking luxury look.

**Ergonomic High-Density Foam for Superior Comfort**
Sink into cloud-like comfort with high-elasticity foam filling that conforms perfectly to your back and lumbar vertebrae, providing optimal support for long hours of sitting or lying. Unlike ordinary foam, our high-density material remains permanently dimensionally stable, so you’ll enjoy the same firm yet plush feel—even after years of use. It’s like having a high-quality mattress built into your sofa, ensuring every moment of relaxation is truly rejuvenating.

**Hidden Storage Space for Clutter-Free Living**
Maximize your living area with the sofa’s clever design: 24 cm high legs create generous ground clearance, allowing vacuum robots to glide underneath for effortless cleaning. This extra space isn’t just for maintenance—use it to store books, slippers, blankets, or other everyday items, keeping your room tidy and organized. It’s the ideal solution for small spaces, where functionality and style go hand in hand.

Whether you’re working from home, hosting guests, or simply unwinding after a long day, this sofa blends versatility, comfort, and elegance to become the heart of your home. Upgrade your living experience today—where practicality meets luxury.
features: Gilded metal feet: Equipped with six stable gold-effect metal feet – capable of supporting over 150 kg, scratch-resistant and particularly stable. Combined with modern metal details, the design gives the living room a stylish touch with a subtle luxury look.

Ergonomic High-Density Foam: Filled with highly elastic foam that optimally conforms to the back and lumbar vertebrae area. Permanently dimensionally stable, even during long periods of sitting or lying down – for a lying feel like on a high-quality mattress.

Hidden storage space: Thanks to the 24 cm high sofa legs, a vacuum robot can easily clean underneath. The increased ground clearance also provides practical space for storing books, slippers and other everyday items – the perfect solution for small rooms.

Introducing Our Versatile and Luxurious Modular Sofa: The Perfect Blend of Comfort, Functionality, and Style for Your Living Space

**Flexible Division & Free Combination**
Designed to adapt to your unique home and lifestyle, this sofa comes with 2 movable ottomans that unlock endless configuration possibilities. Whether you need a U-shaped setup for lively family gatherings, an L-shaped corner arrangement to maximize space in compact rooms, or standalone ottomans to use as a coffee table or extra seating, the modular design effortlessly transforms to suit any scenario. From cozy parent-child interactions to entertaining guests, this sofa adapts to your every need, making it ideal for apartments, houses, and everything in between.

**Luxurious & Spacious Design**
Measuring an impressive 278 x 161 x 81 cm, this extra-large sofa comfortably seats 4–6 people, ensuring everyone has room to relax. Whether you prefer to sit cross-legged, lean back with a book, or stretch out for a nap, the generous dimensions provide the ultimate freedom to unwind. products.detailHtml:

Measuring a generous 220 cm × 194 cm × 85 cm, this sofa is crafted to accommodate 3-5 people effortlessly. Its expansive seating area ensures everyone can sit together without feeling cramped, making it perfect for family movie nights, lively dinners with friends, or even solo lounging. Whether you’re hosting a weekend get-together or enjoying a quiet evening, this sofa adapts seamlessly to your needs, creating a warm and inviting atmosphere for every scenario.

**Premium Fabric for Lasting Comfort & Easy Care**
We’ve selected high-quality breathable cotton and linen fabric to wrap this sofa, offering a luxuriously soft feel against your skin. Not only does this fabric provide exceptional comfort, but it’s also built to last—resistant to wear, pilling, and everyday spills. Cleaning is a breeze, too, thanks to its low-maintenance design, ensuring your sofa stays looking fresh and new for years to come.

**High-Quality Materials for Superior Support**
Beneath the stylish exterior lies a thoughtfully engineered support system. The sofa is filled with independent pocket springs and high-elastic sponge, forming a three-dimensional structure that conforms to your body’s curves with precision. Each pocket spring delivers individualized support to every contact point, while the high-resilience sponge enhances comfort, effectively relieving pressure from prolonged sitting. Say goodbye to sagging or deformation—this sofa is built to maintain its shape and support, even with daily use.

**Cloud-Like Comfort for Unwind Time**
The back cushions and pillows are generously filled with PP cotton, renowned for its exceptional softness and plumpness. Whether you’re leaning back to dive into a book, taking a quick nap, or simply relaxing after a long day, the plush PP cotton adds a layer of coziness that makes every moment on the sofa feel like a retreat. Sink into comfort and let your worries melt away.

Adaptability is key, and this sofa delivers with its innovative movable footrest configuration. Effortlessly switch between U-shaped and L-shaped layouts to suit your living room’s unique dimensions—ideal for open-concept spaces or cozy apartments. The ottoman doubles as a versatile piece: move it to extend the chaise longue for a private resting nook, or separate it to use as an independent footrest. No matter your layout, this sofa adjusts to your lifestyle, ensuring both functionality and style.

products.description: ✦ Cloud-like Design Aesthetic: Unique curved wave armrests + semicircular cushion combination – creating a modern living room art focal point. ✦ 3-stage adjustment mechanism: double-sided independent backrest with 105° working mode / 135° relaxation position / 180° flat lying.
products.detailHtml:
Introducing our stunning modern sofa, a perfect blend of style, functionality, and comfort that will transform your living room into a sophisticated and inviting space.

**Cloud-like Design Aesthetic**
Designed to be the focal point of your home, this sofa features a unique cloud-inspired design with elegant curved wave armrests that flow seamlessly into a semicircular cushion, creating a soft, organic silhouette. The harmonious combination of gentle curves and clean lines adds a touch of contemporary artistry, making it not just a piece of furniture but a statement of modern living.

**3-Stage Adjustment Mechanism for Ultimate Versatility**
Experience customizable comfort with our innovative 3-stage adjustment mechanism. The double-sided independent backrest allows you to switch effortlessly between three modes:
- **105° Working Mode**: Ideal for reading, working, or watching TV, providing optimal back support to keep you focused and comfortable.
- **135° Relaxation Position**: Unwind after a long day with this reclined setting, perfect for lounging, chatting, or enjoying a movie in laid-back comfort.
- **180° Flat Storage**: When extra space is needed, the backrest folds down completely flat, transforming the sofa into a convenient storage surface or even a temporary guest bed, maximizing functionality in compact living spaces.

**Premium Lamb's Wool Blend Upholstery**
Crafted with a high-quality, refined wool blend (note: not real lambskin), this sofa offers a luxurious feel that is both skin-friendly and breathable. The durable fabric resists abrasion and pilling, ensuring long-lasting beauty even with daily use. Sink into the plush cushions and enjoy the softness against your skin, while the material’s natural breathability keeps you cool and comfortable year-round.

**Intelligent Storage Space Design**
Practicality meets style with our intelligent storage solution. The sofa stands on 24.5 cm high feet, creating valuable free floor space underneath. This design is fully compatible with all common robot vacuum cleaners, allowing for easy cleaning and maintenance. Additionally, the under-sofa area provides ample room to store suitcases, storage boxes, or seasonal items, keeping your living room neat and clutter-free.

Elevate your home with a sofa that combines eye-catching design, flexible comfort, and smart functionality. Whether you’re entertaining guests, relaxing with family, or need extra storage, this sofa is designed to meet all your needs while adding a touch of modern elegance to your space.
features: ✦ Premium blended fabric with lambswool: High-quality, refined wool blend (not real lambskin) – skin-friendly, breathable, as well as abrasion-resistant and pilling-resistant.
✦ Masterful load-bearing construction: 6 gold-plated metal supports + imported pinewood frame – total load capacity up to 150 kg.
✦ Intelligent storage space design: 24.5 cm high feet create free floor space – compatible with all common robot vacuum cleaners, perfectly suitable for storing suitcases and similar items.

products.detailHtml:
Introducing our versatile and comfortable sofa bed, designed to maximize your living space while providing exceptional comfort and functionality.

**Space-Saving Design for Every Scenario**
With a compact size of 140.57482 cm, this sofa bed is perfect for small apartments, guest rooms, or home offices. When unfolded, it extends to a generous width of 161 cm, effortlessly transforming from a cozy sofa into a spacious bed to accommodate overnight guests or serve as a relaxing spot for naps. The seamless transition between sofa and bed modes ensures it adapts to your daily needs, whether you’re hosting friends, working from home, or unwinding with a movie.

**Premium Material Combination for Superior Comfort**
Crafted with a thoughtful layering of high-quality materials, this sofa bed prioritizes both softness and durability. From the outer layer inward, it features a smooth washcloth cover for easy cleaning, followed by loose cotton for breathability, non-woven fabric for structural support, and a plush sponge core that cradles your body for a comfortable seating or sleeping experience. Every touch feels gentle and inviting, making it ideal for long hours of relaxation.

**Practical Additions for Enhanced Convenience**
Equipped with 5 cm high sofa legs made of sturdy ordinary plastic, this piece offers stable support while raising the sofa off the floor for easy cleaning underneath. Additionally, it includes a hidden small MDF table, perfect for placing drinks, snacks, remote controls, or even a laptop, adding a functional surface without cluttering your space.

**Stable and Mobile for Flexible Placement**
Designed with robust sofa legs and smooth-rolling castors, this sofa bed combines stability with effortless mobility. The sturdy legs ensure a secure seating experience, while the castors allow you to move the sofa bed around your home with ease—whether you need to rearrange your living room or bring it closer to a window for natural light.

Upgrade your living space with this multi-functional sofa bed that blends style, comfort, and practicality. Perfect for modern homes, it’s more than just furniture—it’s a solution for versatile living.

products.detailHtml:

This exceptional piece of furniture combines thoughtful engineering with premium materials to deliver an unparalleled relaxation experience for you and your family.

First, the main backrest can be effortlessly adjusted to three distinct angles—108°, 135°, and 180°—catering to every activity on your agenda. Whether you’re binge-watching your favorite TV show, diving into a gaming session, or stretching out for a quick nap, you can easily find the perfect angle to support your body and enhance comfort. But that’s not all: the sofa also boasts an **innovative split design with independently adjustable left and right backrests**. This means you and your family members can each set your own "exclusive comfort angle" based on personal sitting habits or space needs—no more compromising! Whether someone prefers a upright position for reading or a reclined one for unwinding, everyone gets to enjoy their ideal setup, creating a dynamic and flexible relaxation space in your living room.

With five adjustable angles, these armrests adapt to your every need, whether you’re resting your arms while working, propping up a book, or snuggling in for a nap. The armrest cushions are generously sized and incredibly soft, resembling a cozy pillow that invites you to lean in and unwind. Imagine adjusting the armrests to your preferred angle, then leaning into their plush support—pure bliss for your shoulders and arms!

Durability and safety are also at the forefront of this sofa’s design. It is equipped with **carefully selected solid wood legs paired with auxiliary feet**, working in harmony to provide a rock-solid, stable foundation. You can relax with complete peace of mind, knowing the sofa stays firmly in place even during lively family gatherings or playful moments—no tipping, no wobbling, just reliable stability that ensures safety all around.

Whether you’re seeking a sofa that adapts to your dynamic lifestyle, caters to multiple family members’ preferences, or simply adds a touch of modern functionality to your home, this multifunctional sofa is the ultimate choice. Experience the perfect blend of comfort, flexibility, and durability—transform your living room into a space where every moment feels tailor-made for relaxation!

Introducing Our L-shaped Chaise Longue Sofa: The Perfect Fusion of Comfort, Functionality, and Style

Elevate your living space with our meticulously designed L-shaped chaise longue sofa, where every detail is crafted to enhance your daily comfort and aesthetic appeal. Measuring L175 × W129 × H90, this multifunctional piece seamlessly blends versatility with modern design, making it an ideal addition to any living room, apartment, or office.

**Unmatched Comfort for Every Moment**
Sink into a cloud-like seating experience, thanks to our innovative double filling system: a core of highly elastic foam paired with separate pocket springs. This dynamic combination ensures the cushions remain thick, plump, and resilient—even after long hours of use—so you’ll never have to worry about sagging or deformation. The scientifically engineered seat depth and height are tailored to cradle your body from the moment you sit down, whether you’re binge-watching your favorite show, hosting guests, or simply unwinding with a good book.

**Flexible Chaise Longue Design**
Adapt to your space with ease! The chaise longue section can be freely moved to the left or right, allowing you to customize the layout to fit your room’s unique dimensions. Whether you prefer a cozy corner for afternoon naps, a spacious setup for movie nights, or a functional spot to stretch out, this sofa adapts to your needs, offering endless possibilities for relaxation.

**Convenience at Your Fingertips**
We’ve thought of everything to keep your living area tidy and organized. Both sides of the sofa feature large, open storage pockets—perfect for stashing remote controls, magazines, mobile phones, or other daily essentials. No more searching for misplaced items; everything you need is within arm’s reach, ensuring a clutter-free environment that lets your sofa’s beauty shine.

**Bonus Soft Cushions for Personalized Comfort**
Included with your sofa are two fluffy, soft cushions, crafted from the same high-quality cotton and linen fabric as the sofa itself. Filled with premium PP cotton, these cushions add an extra layer of coziness: use them to support your waist while reading, prop up your head during a nap, or simply as decorative accents to match your style. Their lightweight design lets you reposition them effortlessly, tailoring your comfort to every activity.

**Practical Beverage Holders**
Entertain with ease using the built-in beverage holders on both sides of the sofa. Keep your coffee, tea, or favorite drink within reach, eliminating the need for extra side tables and ensuring a clean, streamlined look. Whether you’re enjoying a quiet evening alone or hosting a gathering, convenience is always at hand.

Whether you’re seeking a focal point for your living room, a functional seating solution for a small apartment, or a stylish addition to your office lounge, our L-shaped chaise longue sofa delivers on comfort, functionality, and design. Experience the ultimate in relaxation—order yours today!

products.detailHtml:
Indulge in the ultimate relaxation experience with our Boneless Cloud Modular Sofa, where luxury, comfort, and practicality seamlessly converge to transform your living space into a personal haven of tranquility.

**Sink Into Cloud-Like Comfort with Deep-Seat Support**
Designed to cradle your body in pure bliss, this sofa features premium 32D foam that delivers instant softness while maintaining long-lasting resilience—mimicking the sensation of sitting on a cloud. The thoughtfully curved backrest and generous 74cm deep seat wrap around you, promoting perfect posture and ensuring maximum comfort whether you’re unwinding during movie nights, taking a lazy afternoon nap, or simply enjoying quiet moments. products.detailHtml:
Sink into unparalleled relaxation with our Boneless Cloud Modular Sofa, where cloud-like comfort meets versatile design to transform your living space into a personal oasis.

**Cloud-like Comfort & Deep Seat Support**
Experience the ultimate in coziness as you sink into this boneless sofa, crafted with premium 32D foam that delivers instant softness without sacrificing long-lasting support. The foam’s resilient structure ensures a true “cloud couch” feel, while the thoughtfully designed curved backrest and generous 74cm deep seat wrap around your body, promoting perfect posture and maximum relaxation. Whether you’re settling in for movie nights, lazy afternoons, or quick naps, this sofa envelops you in comfort, making every moment feel like a retreat.

**Soft & Pet-Friendly Corduroy Fabric**
Wrapped in velvety-soft, breathable corduroy, this sofa combines luxury with practicality. The fabric is not only incredibly gentle to the touch but also highly durable, designed to resist everyday wear and tear—including pet scratches. Say goodbye to worries about accidental spills or pet mischief, as the material is easy to clean, ensuring your sofa stays looking fresh and inviting. Adding a touch of elegance, pearl-like piping adorns the edges, blending style and functionality seamlessly to elevate your living room decor.

**Modular Design & Endless Possibilities**
Adapt your space to your lifestyle with the sofa’s flexible modular design. Each module can be rearranged to suit your needs, transforming from an ottoman, loveseat, or small sofa to a 2-seater, 3-seater, or 4-seater large sofa. Need extra sleeping space? Configure it into a sofa bed. Prefer an L-shaped or U-shaped setup for entertaining? The possibilities are endless. Create the perfect layout for relaxing with family, hosting guests, or simply stretching out—all tailored to your space and your rules.

**Easy Unpacking & Instant Comfort**
No assembly required! Simply unpack the sofa, gently tap the modules to release the compressed foam, and start enjoying instant comfort. The sofa will gradually expand to 80% of its size within one week, 90% in one month, and fully reach its optimal shape over time. Please note: Due to lighting or screen settings, the sofa’s color may vary slightly, adding a unique, authentic touch to your home.

Elevate your living experience with a sofa that combines comfort, style, and adaptability. Whether you’re seeking a cozy nook or a statement piece for your living room, our Boneless Cloud Modular Sofa is designed to exceed your expectations—one cloud-like moment at a time.

products.detailHtml:
Introducing Our Versatile Cloud Sofa: Where Style Meets Comfort and Flexibility

Elevate your living space with a sofa that adapts to your unique taste and needs—the Cloud Sofa, designed to be more than just a piece of furniture.

**Double the Design, Endless Possibilities**
With our innovative "Buy 1 Sofa, Get 2 Designs" feature, transforming your sofa’s look has never been easier. The set includes removable frilled skirts for both the sofa and ottoman. Keep the frills attached to infuse your room with timeless elegance, or remove them to reveal a sleek, mid-century or transitional aesthetic. Assembly is a breeze, so you can switch between styles in minutes to match your evolving decor.

**Unmatched Comfort for Every Moment**
Sink into luxury with our segmented backrest design, expertly crafted to conform to your body’s curves. High-density foam padding ensures comprehensive support, whether you’re lounging for hours or leaning back to relax. Plus, the included movable cushion adds versatility—use it as a lumbar pillow for extra lower back support, a neck pillow for cozy reading sessions, or adjust it to your perfect sitting position. Comfort is no longer one-size-fits-all.

**Elegant Design That Stands Out**
The Cloud Sofa is a masterpiece of functional art. Its curved back cushions blend seamlessly with spindle-shaped legs, while the flower-inspired armrests and backrest feature elegant, flowing lines. This harmonious design unites beauty and practicality, adding a soft, stylish touch to any room. It’s not just a sofa—it’s a statement piece that elevates your home’s aesthetic.

**Diverse Configurations for Any Space**
Our modular sofa collection is built for flexibility. Mix and match independent modules to create your ideal layout: an L-shaped corner sofa for family gatherings, a chaise lounge for lazy afternoons, or even a sleeper sofa for overnight guests. The ottoman is equally versatile—use it as a footrest, a side table for snacks or drinks, or extra seating when friends come over. Perfect for spacious living rooms or cozy small spaces, this sofa grows with your lifestyle.

Invest in a sofa that does it all: adapt to your style, cradle you in comfort, and fit seamlessly into your space. The Cloud Sofa isn’t just furniture—it’s the heart of your home.

Order now and redefine how you live, relax, and entertain!

What sets this sofa apart is its exquisite round padded armrests—more than just a stylish accent, they add a unique and trendy flair to your decor. Experience the sensation of sitting on a cloud with our innovative cloud-look seat cushions, thoughtfully designed without springs or wood for a perfectly balanced blend of support and elasticity. The deep seat offers additional lumbar support, while included decorative cushions and lumbar pillows provide extra hold, ensuring your back and waist feel pampered during long hours of lounging. Whether you’re watching TV, diving into a good book, or chatting with family, the sofa backrest adapts seamlessly to your body, offering personalized support that makes every moment feel incomparably comfortable.

Your comfort and safety are our top priorities. That’s why our seat cushions are filled with premium high-elastic foam and fiber filling, delivering a soft yet supportive feel that truly lives up to the “cloud-like” experience. Whether you’re unwinding after a long day or settling in for a lazy weekend, this sofa promises an incredibly comfortable experience that keeps you coming back.

Adapt your space to your unique needs with our flexible modular sofa sets. Effortlessly assemble the pieces into a U-shape, L-shape, or straight configuration, allowing you to optimize the sofa for your room’s size and style. Perfect for apartments, living rooms, or even offices, this modular design ensures your furniture works *for* you, not against you.

products.detailHtml:
Introducing our versatile and innovatively designed multifunctional sofa, crafted to elevate your living room relaxation experience to new heights. This exceptional piece of furniture seamlessly combines functionality, comfort, and stability to cater to all your daily needs.

The star feature of this sofa lies in its **adjustable backrest system**, which offers not one, but two layers of customization. First, the backrest can be effortlessly adjusted to three distinct angles: 108°, 135°, and 180°, allowing you to switch between activities with ease. Whether you’re binge-watching your favorite TV show, diving into a gaming session, or settling in for a cozy nap, there’s a perfect angle to support your posture and maximize comfort. But that’s not all—thanks to its **innovative split design**, the left and right backrests can be adjusted independently. This means you and your family members can each set your own exclusive comfort angle, tailored to your unique sitting habits and space requirements. No more compromising—create a flexible, personalized relaxation zone where everyone feels right at home.

Complementing the adjustable backrests are the sofa’s **versatile armrests**, engineered for ultimate convenience. With five adjustable angles, these armrests adapt to your every need, whether you’re resting your arms while reading, using a laptop, or simply unwinding. The armrest cushions are generously sized and incredibly soft, resembling a plush pillow that invites you to lean in and drift into a peaceful sleep.

Stability and safety are never compromised with this sofa. It stands firmly on **carefully selected solid wood legs**, paired with auxiliary feet, ensuring a robust and secure hold. You can relax with complete peace of mind, knowing the sofa will remain stable during use, eliminating any worries of tipping over.

The soft bag design not only adds to the sofa’s visual appeal but also ensures a consistent, coordinated appearance from every angle, elevating the overall ambiance of your room.

Beneath the luxurious fabric lies **High Density Sponge** filling, the secret to the sofa’s exceptional support and durability. This high-quality sponge offers superior elasticity, retaining its shape even after years of use, and ensures the pillows remain plump and intact. Say goodbye to sagging cushions—this sofa is built to provide long-lasting comfort and maintain its inviting look, making it a smart investment for your home.

Transform your living space into a haven of comfort and style with this versatile, thoughtfully designed sofa set. Whether you’re relaxing alone, hosting guests, or reimagining your room layout, it’s the perfect combination of functionality, comfort, and modern design. Upgrade your home today and experience the difference!

You can relax with confidence, knowing the sofa remains steady even during everyday use, free from annoying vibrations. Inside, the sofa is filled with new high-density foam that provides exceptional support and comfort whether you’re sitting or lying down. The thoughtfully crafted curved backrest and generous 74cm deep seat cradle your body in perfect posture, making every movie night, lazy afternoon nap, or quiet reading session an experience in ultimate comfort.

Designed with both style and practicality in mind, this sofa is upholstered in velvety-soft corduroy fabric that’s as breathable as it is durable. Its pet-friendly construction resists scratches from playful furry friends, while the easy-to-clean material ensures worry-free maintenance—so you can enjoy life’s little messes without stress. Adding a touch of elegance, delicate pearl-like piping adorns the edges, elevating this piece from a mere furniture item to a chic centerpiece for your living room.

The low-to-the-ground profile and extra-wide armrests offer a safe, stable spot to set drinks, remote controls, or your favorite book, blending modern aesthetics with everyday practicality.

What truly sets this sofa apart is its modular versatility. With endless arrangement possibilities, the modules can be configured to suit any space or need: use them as a standalone ottoman, a cozy loveseat, a compact 2-seater, a spacious 3-seater, or even a 4-seater large sofa. Transform it into a sofa bed for overnight guests, or arrange into L-shaped or U-shaped configurations to maximize seating for entertaining. Your living room, your rules—rearrange as often as your mood or occasion demands.

Best of all, comfort is instant. No complicated assembly required! Simply unpack the modules, gently pat them to release compression, and start enjoying. The sofa will expand to 80% of its size within one week, 90% in one month, and fully reach its plush form over time. Please note that color may vary slightly due to lighting or screen settings, ensuring each piece has a unique, authentic charm.

products.detailHtml:
Introducing Our Versatile Cloud Sofa: Where Style Meets Comfort and Functionality

Transform your living space with the Cloud Sofa—a masterpiece of design that seamlessly blends elegance, comfort, and flexibility. Whether you’re hosting guests, unwinding after a long day, or optimizing a small living area, this sofa is engineered to adapt to your needs while elevating your decor.

### **Double the Design, Effortlessly**
【Buy 1 Sofa, Get 2 Designs】 Experience the ultimate versatility with removable ruffled skirts for both the sofa and ottoman. Assembly is incredibly easy, and with a simple attachment or removal of the skirts, you’ll instantly switch between two distinct looks. Keep the delicate ruffles to infuse your room with timeless elegance, or remove them for a sleek, mid-century modern or transitional vibe. It’s like owning two sofas in one—no extra cost, just endless style possibilities.

### **Unmatched Comfort for Every Moment**
【Soft and Comfortable】 Sink into pure bliss with our segmented backrest design and high-density foam padding, which conforms perfectly to your body’s curves. Whether you’re sitting upright to read or leaning back to relax, this sofa provides comprehensive support for long hours of comfort. The included movable pillow adds an extra layer of versatility: use it as a lumbar cushion for lower back support, a neck pillow for cozy naps, or adjust it to your preferred sitting position. Every detail is crafted to make your relaxation time truly luxurious.

### **Elegant Design That Captivates**
【Unique Design】 Beauty meets craftsmanship in every curve of this sofa. The curved back cushions create a soft, inviting silhouette, while spindle-shaped legs add a touch of sophistication. The flower-shaped armrests and backrest feature elegant, flowing lines that harmonize functionality with aesthetics, giving your space a gentle, stylish focal point. It’s not just a sofa—it’s a statement piece that elevates your home’s interior.

### **Flexible Combinations for Any Space**
【Diverse Flexible Combinations】 This sofa collection is built for adaptability. With several independent modules, you can rearrange it into endless layouts: an L-shaped sofa for family movie nights, a chaise longue for lazy afternoons, or even a sleeper sofa for overnight guests. The ottoman is equally versatile—use it as a footrest, a side table, or extra seating when needed. Perfect for large living rooms or compact spaces, this corner sofa meets diverse needs with ease, making it the ideal centerpiece for any home.

Elevate your living experience with the Cloud Sofa—where versatility, comfort, and style converge. Order now and discover why it’s the perfect addition to your home!

Designed with practicality in mind, the compact 2-seater silhouette is a game-changer for smaller areas. It expertly maximizes space without compromising on comfort, offering a comfortable seating solution that is perfect for tighter living quarters, studio apartments, or home offices where every square inch counts. Despite its space-saving design, it doesn't skimp on providing a relaxing spot to unwind, read a book, or engage in casual conversations.

The secret to its long-lasting comfort lies in the high-quality, high-density foam filling of the seat cushions. This premium foam not only delivers exceptional support but also retains its shape even after years of daily use, ensuring that the sofa maintains its inviting look and feel over time. Complemented by the soft and breathable velvet fabric, the cushions offer a luxurious tactile experience, keeping you cool and comfortable during extended sittings. Whether you're lounging for hours or entertaining guests, this sofa promises enduring comfort and durability that stands the test of time.

Safety and stability are paramount, which is why this sofa is equipped with anti-slip pads underneath its base. These pads effectively prevent the sofa from slipping or sliding on smooth floors, ensuring a secure and stable seating experience for you and your loved ones. You can rest easy knowing that the sofa stays firmly in place, even with regular use, providing peace of mind and added safety.

In summary, our 2-seater velvet sofa is more than just a piece of furniture – it's a stylish, space-saving, and comfortable addition to any home or office. **2. Cozy Living Room Sofa**
Sink into pure luxury with this plush sofa, meticulously crafted with a curved, body-hugging silhouette that naturally conforms to your posture for effortless leaning. The secret to its unparalleled comfort lies in the premium 32D high-resilience foam—engineered to rebound quickly and maintain its shape over time, ensuring long-lasting durability. Wrapped in skin-friendly plush fabric, every touch feels soft and inviting, offering an immediate, cloud-like envelopment that makes you never want to leave. The extra-wide, reinforced seat provides ample space to stretch out, while the connectable ottoman extends leg support, effectively reducing pressure and fatigue. No matter where you sit, every spot becomes your personal comfortable relaxation area.

**3. Spacious Modular Design**
Designed with the whole family in mind, our modular corner sofa boasts ample space to accommodate everyone. Its extra-wide dimensions create a generous seating area, while the sleep-friendly armrests are perfectly sized for resting your head during a short nap—making it ideal for sleeping, unwinding after a long day, or losing yourself in a good book. Whether you need a cozy corner setup or a sprawling seating arrangement, this sofa adapts optimally to your home’s unique dimensions.

Embrace minimalist style without compromising on functionality. This modular sofa offers customizable layouts to suit your needs, including U-shape, L-shape, and 2–4-seater configurations. The non-slip base ensures stability and durability, even with frequent rearrangements, so you can confidently adjust the components to fit your space and usage requirements. Whether you’re hosting guests, rearranging your living room, or simply updating your decor, this sofa adapts effortlessly to your lifestyle.

**5. No Assembly Required**
Skip the hassle of complicated setup and enjoy immediate comfort—this sofa requires no assembly. Simply unpack each part of the Cloud Sofa, fluff the cushions, and watch it transform. Within 72 hours, it will reach its full, luxurious shape, instantly creating a photo-ready, effortless relaxation area that’s perfect for entertaining, lounging, or simply enjoying quiet moments at home.

products.detailHtml:
Indulge in the ultimate relaxation experience with our Boneless Cloud Modular Sofa—where comfort, style, and versatility converge to transform your living space into a personal sanctuary.

**Sink into Cloud-Like Comfort with Deep-Seat Support**
Designed to cradle your body in pure luxury, this sofa features premium 32D foam that delivers instant softness while maintaining long-lasting resilience, ensuring a true "cloud couch" feel with every sit. The thoughtfully curved backrest and generous 74cm deep seat wrap around you in perfect alignment, promoting optimal posture for hours of unmatched comfort—whether you’re binge-watching your favorite shows, enjoying a lazy afternoon nap, or unwinding after a long day. It’s not just a sofa; it’s your go-to spot for relaxation.

**Soft, Pet-Friendly Corduroy Fabric**
Wrapped in velvety corduroy, the sofa boasts a luxuriously soft and breathable texture that feels gentle against the skin. Engineered to resist pet scratches, this durable fabric ensures peace of mind even in homes with furry friends. Spills and messes are no match for its easy-to-clean surface, making maintenance a breeze. Accented with elegant pearl-like piping, the sofa effortlessly blends style and practicality, elevating the aesthetic of any living room with a touch of sophistication.

**Non-Slip Safety & Spacious Armrests for Active Households**
Safety meets functionality with a non-slip base that keeps the sofa securely in place, even during lively playtime with kids or pets. The low-to-the-floor design adds a modern, minimalist vibe while ensuring stability, and the extra-wide armrests provide ample space to rest your arms, set down drinks, or even place a book or remote. It’s a sofa built to keep up with your busy, active lifestyle.

**Modular Design: Endless Possibilities for Your Space**
Adaptable to any room and occasion, this modular sofa offers limitless configuration options to suit your needs. products.detailHtml:
Indulge in the ultimate combination of comfort, style, and convenience with our premium corduroy sofa, designed to transform your living space into a cozy retreat. Crafted with meticulous attention to detail, this sofa features a double-padded construction that sets it apart from ordinary seating options. The lower layer is made of highly elastic foam, providing a sturdy and supportive base, while the upper layer is topped with plush padded cushions, elevating both the sofa’s elegance and your seating experience. This thoughtful design not only enhances the sofa’s overall aesthetic appeal but also ensures exceptional comfort with every sit.

Adding to its comfort quotient, the top cushions are filled with slow-rebound high-density foam particles. As you settle into the sofa, these particles adapt to your body’s contours, offering an increasingly soft and personalized feel that cradles you in relaxation. Whether you’re enjoying a movie night or unwinding after a long day, the foam particles work to relieve pressure, making every moment on the sofa a truly luxurious one.

Designed with your comfort in mind, this corduroy sofa also comes with three accompanying pillows, each of which can be paired with a detachable neck pillow. When you lie down, these neck pillows provide optimal support for your neck, ensuring a restful nap or lazy afternoon. Even when leaning back, the combination of the neck pillows and the sofa’s cushions offers extra support, promoting proper posture and reducing strain on your back and shoulders.

We understand that convenience matters, which is why this sofa requires no complicated assembly. Simply unpack the sofa modules, arrange them to your liking, and allow 72 hours for the materials to fully expand. Once expanded, you’ll have a fully finished, ready-to-use piece of furniture that instantly elevates your living room’s comfort and style.

Experience the perfect blend of sophistication, functionality, and ease with our corduroy sofa—where every detail is designed to enhance your daily life.

products.detailHtml:
Introducing our versatile Free Switching Multifunctional Sofa – the ultimate solution for modern living spaces! This innovative piece of furniture seamlessly transforms from a stylish sofa to a comfortable sleeper with just a simple press and pull, making it perfect for small families, apartments, or anyone looking to maximize space without compromising on functionality.

Designed with your comfort in mind, our sofa features three golden backrest angles to suit every activity. The 108° upright sofa mode provides optimal support for working, reading, or catching up with friends, ensuring no pressure on your back even during long sessions. For a more relaxed experience, switch to the 135° semi-recline mode – ideal for cinema-level movie nights or gaming marathons, letting you sink into comfort while enjoying your favorite content. When it’s time to rest, the 180° full-flat sleeping mode converts the sofa into a cozy bed, offering a restful night’s sleep or a quick nap whenever needed.

Crafted for luxury and durability, the sofa boasts a premium cotton material that’s soft, skin-friendly, and suitable for all seasons. Its wrinkle-resistant, wear-resistant, and pill-resistant fabric ensures long-lasting beauty, even with daily use. The seat cushion is filled with high-elastic sponge and independent pocket springs, providing exceptional support that won’t sag, even after prolonged sitting. Supported by a sturdy iron frame, each seat can bear up to 150 kg, guaranteeing stability and resistance to deformation for years to come.

As a thoughtful bonus, the sofa comes with 2 matching pillows filled with high-quality PP cotton. These pillows maintain their shape even under prolonged pressure and are upholstered in the same skin-friendly fabric as the sofa. Use them as lumbar support to relieve fatigue during long sitting sessions, or as headrests when the sofa is in bed mode – adding an extra layer of comfort to your relaxation.

Practicality meets aesthetics with our sofa’s clever design. Additionally, each armrest is equipped with a side storage pocket, perfect for keeping magazines, remote controls, or small essentials organized – no more searching around for your items!

Whether you need a sleek sofa for your living room, a guest bed for visitors, or a comfortable spot to unwind, our Free Switching Multifunctional Sofa delivers on style, comfort, and versatility. Upgrade your home today with this must-have piece that blends functionality and elegance seamlessly!
