**360° Free, Smooth Rotation & Stable Metal Base**
Designed for effortless movement, this chair features a 360° free and smooth rotation mechanism, allowing you to seamlessly change direction without having to move the entire chair—perfect for effortlessly shifting focus while watching TV, soaking up sunlight by the window, or joining conversations with family and friends. The stable metal base ensures exceptional durability, boasting a robust load capacity of up to 136 kg, making it a reliable choice for daily use. Its compact footprint makes it an ideal addition to small living spaces, maximizing both style and utility.

**Double-Layer Seat Cushion for Unmatched Comfort**
Sink into luxury with the double-layer seat cushion, expertly engineered for optimal support and pressure relief. The top layer of high-density foam distributes weight evenly, while the bottom layer of pocket springs delivers strong, responsive support—creating a perfect soft-hard combination. This innovative design not only envelops your body in comfort but also ensures breathability, preventing sweat buildup even during long sitting sessions. The cushion maintains its shape over time, offering lasting comfort without fatigue, whether you’re working, relaxing, or entertaining.

**Ergonomic Design with Adjustable Support Pillow**
Prioritizing your spinal health, the chair’s backrest is contoured to naturally follow the curve of your spine, providing targeted support to reduce strain on your lower back. The included support pillow adds an extra layer of customization—easily repositioned to cradle your neck or lumbar region, ensuring personalized comfort. Whether you’re reading, napping, or unwinding after a long day, this ergonomic design promotes relaxation for both your back and neck, making every moment of seating a truly舒适 experience.

**Hauchzweiches Chenille Fabric: Soft, Skin-Friendly & Low-Maintenance**
Wrapped in hauchzweiches chenille fabric, the chair offers a luxuriously soft and velvety texture that is gentle on the skin, even for those with sensitive skin types. The fabric is highly breathable, allowing air to circulate and keeping you cool and comfortable year-round. Accidental spills or stains are a breeze to clean—simply wipe with a damp cloth, saving you time and effort on maintenance.

**Oversized Format & Versatile Aesthetic**
With its oversized design, the chair features a spacious seating area and sufficient depth, providing ample room to stretch out or curl up cozily. Its simple, understated style in soft, neutral tones effortlessly complements any decor, from modern bedrooms and living rooms to playful children’s rooms. products.detailHtml:
Transform Your Living Space with Our Multifunctional Sofa Bed – Where Comfort Meets Versatility!

Tired of choosing between a sofa and a bed? Look no further! Our innovative sofa bed seamlessly combines style, functionality, and comfort to elevate your home. Whether you need a cozy spot for daily relaxation or a convenient sleeping solution for unexpected guests, this piece is designed to adapt to your every need.

**Effortless Sofa-to-Bed Transformation in Seconds**
With our game-changing pull-out design, converting your sofa into a spacious double bed is as easy as a light pull. No complicated mechanisms or heavy lifting – simply glide the frame forward, and you’ll have a comfortable sleeping surface ready in seconds. Perfect for small apartments, living rooms, or bedrooms, it maximizes space without sacrificing comfort, making it ideal for both daily use and hosting overnight guests.

**Three-Stage Adjustable Backrest for Personalized Relaxation**
Your comfort, your way! The sofa bed features a three-stage adjustable backrest that lets you customize your seating experience. Whether you’re working from home (upright position), unwinding with a book (semi-reclined), or stretching out for a nap (fully extended), you’ll find the perfect angle to relax. Say goodbye to stiff seating – this design ensures support and comfort, no matter how you choose to lounge.

**Luxurious Soft Cotton-Linen Fabric – Breathable & Skin-Friendly**
Sink into pure comfort with our high-quality cotton-linen blend fabric. Its ultra-fine texture promotes optimal air circulation, keeping you cool and comfortable even on warm days. Paired with high-density foam padding, the seat offers a soft yet supportive feel that stays resilient – even during long hours of sitting or sleeping. Gentle on sensitive skin and resistant to wear, this fabric is both durable and delightfully tactile.

**Sturdy Wood-Metal Frame – Built to Last**
We believe in durability, which is why this sofa bed is crafted with a robust wood-metal construction. The frame delivers unbeatable stability, ensuring no wobbling or creaking, even with daily use. Smooth metal rollers make pulling out the bed effortless, while the material resists deformation over time. Rest easy knowing this piece is designed to withstand years of relaxation and guest visits.

**Thoughtful Design for Added Convenience**
Every detail is designed with you in mind! The sofa bed stands securely on stable plastic feet, preventing scratches on floors and ensuring steady support. Plus, it comes with two multifunctional cushions – use them as soft sofa accents during the day, or as pillows for a restful night’s sleep. Practical, versatile, and stylish, this sofa bed is more than furniture – it’s a lifestyle upgrade.

Upgrade your home today with a sofa bed that does it all – comfort, convenience, and durability, all in one sleek package. Perfect for modern living, it’s time to experience the ultimate in space-saving luxury!

products.detailHtml:
Indulge in the ultimate comfort and versatility with our exceptional modular sofa, thoughtfully designed to elevate your living space. Crafted with high-quality Chenille Fabric, the sofa cover offers a luxuriously soft, breathable, and skin-friendly feel, ensuring maximum comfort during your daily relaxation moments. Whether you're unwinding after a long day or enjoying quality time with family and friends, the durable yet pleasantly soft Chenille material provides a cozy and inviting seating experience.

Featuring a flexible combinable 4-seater design with a separate ottoman, this modular sofa effortlessly adapts to your unique living situation, making it perfect for both large and small spaces. The versatility allows you to rearrange the pieces to suit your needs, whether you prefer a spacious seating arrangement for gatherings or a compact setup for a more intimate setting.

Beyond its comfort and flexibility, the ottoman is a true multitasker. Not only does it serve as a convenient footrest to kick back and relax or an extra seating option for guests, but it also includes hidden storage space. This practical storage solution is ideal for keeping pillows, blankets, magazines, or other living room essentials neatly organized and out of sight, helping you maintain a clutter-free environment.

Built to last, the sofa boasts a stable and durable metal-wood frame that guarantees long-term sturdiness and support. The robust combination of metal and wood ensures the structure can withstand daily use, while the plastic feet not only add to its stability but also protect your floors from scratches and scuffs, making it suitable for various flooring types.

Transform your living room into a haven of comfort, style, and functionality with this all-in-one modular sofa. It’s more than just a piece of furniture—it’s a perfect blend of practicality, durability, and modern design, tailored to enhance your everyday living experience.
features: Hidden storage space in the ottoman. The spacious ottoman not only serves as a footrest or seat but also provides practical storage space for pillows, blankets, and more.

Stable and durable – metal-wood frame with plastic feet. The combination of robust metal and wood guarantees stability, while the plastic feet protect the floor.

products.detailHtml:
Introducing our versatile and thoughtfully designed sofa bed, crafted to elevate your living experience with a perfect blend of functionality, comfort, and modern style.

**3-Way Adjustable Backrest for Customized Comfort**
The ergonomic backrest features three distinct positions, allowing you to effortlessly switch between sitting, relaxing, or sleeping modes. Whether you’re enjoying a morning coffee, unwinding with a book, or accommodating overnight guests, each position is individually adjustable to suit your unique preferences, ensuring optimal support and relaxation for every member of the household.

**Luxurious Soft Fabric Cover**
Wrapped in high-quality, skin-friendly fabric, this sofa bed offers a supremely soft and breathable surface that feels gentle against the skin. The material is not only inviting to the touch but also easy to care for, making maintenance a breeze. Its sleek, modern design seamlessly complements any decor, from contemporary living rooms and cozy guest rooms to functional home offices, adding a touch of elegance to your space.

**Convenient Phone Holder with Charging Capabilities**
Stay connected and entertained with the integrated phone holder, designed to keep your device secure and accessible for streaming, gaming, or video calls—no need to hold it in your hand. Plus, two built-in USB ports ensure your phone or other devices stay charged, so you can enjoy extended use without interruption.

**Practical Side Storage Pocket**
Tidy up your living area with the handy side storage pocket, perfect for stashing books, magazines, remote controls, or other small essentials. This smart design helps keep your sofa bed organized and clutter-free, maintaining a clean and inviting atmosphere.

**Plush Sponge Filling for Long-Lasting Comfort**
Filled with premium elastic foam, the sofa bed adapts perfectly to your body shape, providing exceptional comfort whether you’re sitting for hours or sleeping through the night. The high-density sponge ensures durability and support, making it ideal for daily use as a sofa or a comfortable bed for guests.

Upgrade your home with this all-in-one sofa bed that combines style, convenience, and comfort—designed to meet the demands of modern living. Perfect for small spaces, apartments, or anyone seeking a versatile furniture piece that doesn’t compromise on quality.
features: Phone holder with charging function – Integrated phone holder plus two USB ports for convenient streaming, gaming or video calls without holding the device in your hand.

During the day, switch to soft, natural lighting to create a bright, inviting atmosphere for reading or relaxing. At night, adjust to warmer tones to unwind after a long day, or choose vibrant hues to set the mood for gatherings. This adjustable lighting doesn’t just elevate ambiance – it actively supports your well-being by reducing eye strain during work or leisure, transforming your space into a personalized comfort or productivity oasis.

Crafted for both luxury and durability, the chair features a structured, long-pile velvet material that delights the senses. Its soft, plush texture offers a supremely comfortable, skin-friendly experience, making every sit feel like a gentle embrace. The fine finish and rich, long-pile design not only exude a classic, upscale look but also ensure the chair stands up to daily use – it’s wear-resistant, easy to maintain, and built to last, so you can enjoy its beauty and comfort for years to come.

Practicality is key, and this armchair delivers with thoughtful extras: a built-in USB port lets you conveniently charge your phone, tablet, or other devices without leaving the comfort of your seat, while a handy cup holder keeps your water, coffee, or favorite beverage within arm’s reach. Whether you’re diving into a book, catching up on work, or simply unwinding, this chair combines style, comfort, and functionality to make every moment feel luxurious.

Upgrade your space today with an armchair that does more than just look good – it enriches your daily life. Experience the perfect balance of timeless design, modern convenience, and unmatched comfort with our oversized armchair.
features: Structured, long-pile velvet material: The soft texture and fine quality not only enhance the chair's quality but also provide a comfortable, skin-friendly feel. The long-pile velvet material accentuates the classic look, is wear-resistant, durable, and easy to care for.

products.detailHtml:
Introducing Our Versatile L-shaped Chaise Longue Sofa: The Perfect Blend of Comfort, Functionality, and Style

Elevate your living space with our L-shaped Chaise Longue Sofa, a masterpiece designed to seamlessly merge comfort, practicality, and modern aesthetics. Measuring L175 × W129 × H90, this multifunctional sofa is crafted to transform any room—whether it’s your living room, apartment, or office—into a cozy retreat.

**Unmatched Comfort for Every Moment**
Sink into pure luxury with our sofa’s scientifically engineered seating system. The cushions feature a double-filling design: premium highly elastic foam combined with a separate pocket spring core. This dynamic duo ensures thick, plump support that retains its shape even after years of use, so you never have to worry about sagging or deformation. The carefully calculated seat depth and height cradle your body from the moment you sit down, delivering a cloud-like, weightless comfort that makes movie nights, reading sessions, or afternoon naps feel effortlessly indulgent.

**Flexible Chaise Longue for Customizable Layouts**
Adapt to your space with ease—the chaise longue can be freely positioned on the left or right side, allowing you to tailor the sofa to your room’s layout. Whether you’re stretching out for a solo relaxation session or hosting guests, this versatile design ensures everyone has their own comfortable spot.

**Convenience at Your Fingertips**
We’ve thought of every detail to enhance your daily life. Dual cup holders, one on each side, provide a secure spot for your morning coffee, evening tea, or favorite beverage, keeping spills at bay and your hands free. Plus, large storage pockets on both sides offer quick access to remote controls, magazines, mobile phones, and other essentials. The open design lets you grab what you need in an instant while keeping your living area clutter-free—no more hunting for lost remotes!

**Bonus Soft Cushions for Added Comfort**
Complete your comfort experience with two fluffy, soft cushions included with your sofa. Made from the same durable cotton and linen fabric as the sofa and filled with high-quality PP cotton, these cushions are perfect for lumbar support during long TV marathons or as extra padding for lazy afternoons. Rearrange them to your liking—support your back, prop up your feet, or simply snuggle up with them for added coziness.

Whether you’re unwinding after a long day, entertaining friends, or creating a stylish focal point in your home, our L-shaped Chaise Longue Sofa is the ultimate choice for those who refuse to compromise on comfort, functionality, or design. Upgrade your space today and discover the perfect balance of form and function!

The ottoman can be easily moved to extend the chaise longue, creating a private relaxation area for ultimate comfort, or separated to function as an independent footrest. This adaptability makes it perfectly suited for different apartment layouts, whether you have a compact living room or a spacious open area.

Elevate your home with a sofa that blends functionality, durability, and comfort seamlessly—ideal for creating memorable moments with loved ones or enjoying peaceful alone time.

products.detailHtml:
Upgrade Your Living Space with Ultimate Comfort and Versatility!

Sink into unparalleled relaxation with our premium sofa, meticulously designed to blend luxurious comfort, smart functionality, and modern convenience.

**Memory Foam Comfort for Long Hours of Relaxation**
Crafted with a thoughtful combination of high-density foam and responsive memory foam, this sofa delivers the perfect balance of softness and resilience. Whether you’re unwinding after a long day, binge-watching your favorite shows, or hosting guests, the supportive cushioning conforms to your body’s contours, relieving pressure points and ensuring lasting comfort—even during extended sitting sessions. Say goodbye to stiff muscles and hello to a seating experience that feels like a warm embrace.

**Practical Side Pockets: Keep Essentials Within Reach**
Tired of misplacing your remote, magazines, or tablet? Our sofa features integrated side pockets strategically placed for easy access. Store your TV remote, current read, or even your tablet, keeping your living room clutter-free and your essentials right at your fingertips. No more searching through cushions or leaving items scattered—stay organized without sacrificing style.

**Sliding Center Console: Adaptable Convenience at Your Fingertips**
The innovative sliding center console is a game-changer for versatility. Equipped with two deep cup holders (perfect for your morning coffee or evening drink), a spacious storage compartment, and a handy drawer, this console adapts to your needs. Slide it left, right, or center to match your seating position—whether you’re enjoying a solo movie night, sharing snacks with family, or working from home. It’s the ultimate blend of functionality and flexibility.

**Flexible Storage Stool: More Than Just Extra Seating**
Included with your sofa is a multi-purpose storage stool that adds even more utility to your space. Use it as a footrest to elevate your legs and enhance relaxation, an extra seat for guests, or a storage solution for blankets, pillows, or living room essentials. Lightweight and easy to move, this stool seamlessly integrates into your lifestyle, ensuring your space remains both practical and stylish.

Transform your living room into a haven of comfort and efficiency with this all-in-one sofa set. Designed for modern living, it combines premium materials, thoughtful storage, and adaptable features to meet your everyday needs. Experience the perfect mix of luxury and practicality—order yours today and elevate your home!

products.detailHtml:

Whether you’re hosting guests, enjoying a movie night, or simply unwinding after a long day, the extra-wide seats offer a plush, supportive surface that feels as soft as it looks, ensuring durability for years to come.

What truly sets this sofa apart is its modular flexibility. More than just a standard L-shaped sofa, each piece can be used individually or combined with other parts to adapt to your changing needs. Need a cozy corner setup for relaxation? Rearrange the modules into an L-shape. Hosting a larger gathering? Separate the sections to create additional seating. This adaptability makes it perfect for any space, from compact apartments to spacious family rooms.

Moving and setup are a breeze, too. Thanks to its lightweight, individual modules, navigating narrow hallways or tight doorframes is stress-free—no need to worry about maneuvering bulky furniture. Plus, assembly is entirely unnecessary: simply unpack, and according to the included instructions, allow the sofa to expand for approximately 72 hours to regain its full shape. Then, you’re ready to enjoy your new lounge area without any hassle.

Designed for life’s moments, this modular sofa set isn’t just furniture—it’s a versatile, durable, and stylish addition to your home that grows with you. products.detailHtml:
Transform your living space with our versatile and stylish modular sofa set, designed to blend seamlessly into any home while prioritizing comfort, convenience, and durability.

**Effortless Setup, No Assembly Hassle**
Say goodbye to complicated instructions and time-consuming assembly—this sofa set is ready to enjoy right out of the box! Simply unpack, then allow the sofa to rest for approximately 72 hours as directed, gently pressing the cushions together to help them regain their original shape and plumpness. It’s the ultimate solution for busy lifestyles or anyone seeking instant comfort without the stress of tools or construction.

**Designed for Life’s Moments**
Crafted with both aesthetics and functionality in mind, this luxurious sofa set features rounded edges for safety and an elegant, inviting appearance that elevates any room. Sink into its soft, durable upholstery and extra-wide seats—perfect for stretching out during movie nights, hosting family gatherings, or unwinding with friends. Whether you’re curling up with a book or entertaining guests, this sofa balances style and coziness effortlessly.

**Timeless Style, Modern Convenience**
With a focus on clean lines and a simple, cord-covered design, this modular sofa adds a timeless, sophisticated touch to your home. Its understated elegance ensures it complements a variety of decor styles, from modern minimalist to classic温馨, making it a versatile centerpiece for any lounge area.

**Easy to Move, Even in Tight Spaces**
Each piece of this modular set can be moved individually, solving the challenge of navigating narrow doorways, tight hallways, or staircases. Whether you’re rearranging your living room, moving to a new home, or simply need to clean underneath, you’ll appreciate the flexibility and convenience of its lightweight, maneuverable design.

**Versatile Use for Every Space**
This sofa isn’t limited to the living room—its adaptability makes it ideal for apartments, bedrooms, guest rooms, or even children’s rooms. Kids will love jumping and playing on its sturdy, supportive surface, while the compact design ensures no space is wasted, even in attics or smaller areas. It’s the perfect blend of fun, function, and practicality for the whole family.

Elevate your home with a sofa that’s as functional as it is beautiful—order yours today and experience the perfect combination of comfort, style, and convenience!

Even after prolonged use, it instantly returns to its original shape, ensuring the chair retains its comfort and structure for years to come.

Experience the perfect blend of convenience, comfort, and style with the Cloud Chair – where every detail is designed to make your life easier and more enjoyable. Order yours today and discover the joy of hassle-free, luxurious seating!

products.detailHtml:
Elevate your living space with our Stylish Floor Chair, a perfect blend of modern aesthetics and functional comfort that effortlessly enhances any interior decor. Designed with a trendy silhouette, this chair adds a touch of elegance and sophistication, making it a striking focal point in your living room, bedroom, or reading nook.

Experience unparalleled comfort with its thick and soft padding, paired with a luxurious velour-look cover that ensures a cozy seating experience in all temperatures—whether it’s a warm summer day or a chilly winter evening, you’ll always feel relaxed and at ease.

The standout feature of this floor chair is its 360° adjustable backrest, which can be reclined up to a maximum of 120°, allowing you to find the perfect angle for reading, gaming, watching TV, or simply lounging. Additionally, the chair swivels a full 360 degrees, giving you the freedom to turn and interact with your surroundings without moving the entire chair. The sturdy steel frame not only provides a safe and stable stance but also guarantees long-lasting durability, ensuring this piece remains a staple in your home for years to come.

Crafted for solid performance, the frame is made of high-quality solid steel, capable of supporting up to 120 kg, making it a robust and reliable furniture choice for daily use. The linen-look cover is not only hard-wearing but also easy to care for, ensuring the chair maintains its fresh appearance even with regular use.

**Product Specifications:**
- **Overall Dimensions:** 62L x 70W x 95H cm
- **Recommended Maximum Load:** 120 kg
- **Assembly:** Required

products.detailHtml:
Introducing the Cloud Chair – the ultimate blend of effortless setup, luxurious comfort, and versatile style, designed to transform any space into your personal sanctuary.

**No Assembly Required – Unbox and Relax Instantly**
Say goodbye to confusing instructions and tedious assembly! Our modular Cloud Chair arrives ready to enjoy. Simply unpack all components, gently tap and arrange the parts to restore their elasticity, and let the chair fully recover (which may take up to 72 hours for optimal fluffiness). No tools, no stress – just pure, hassle-free comfort from the moment you unbox.

**Premium Chenille Fabric – Softness Meets Durability**
Crafted with high-quality chenille fabric, this chair offers an indulgently soft touch that feels like a cloud against your skin. Not only is it luxuriously comfortable, but it’s also remarkably durable, breathable, and free from harmful chemicals, ensuring safety for you and your family. The fabric resists wear and pilling, maintaining its elegant appearance even with daily use, while adding a touch of sophistication to any room decor.

**High-Density Elastic Foam – Cloud-Like Comfort That Lasts**
Sink into unparalleled comfort with our high-density, highly elastic foam filling. Engineered to provide optimal support, it cradles your body in a cloud-like embrace, whether you’re relaxing after a long day, playing games, or diving into a good book. Even after prolonged use, the foam instantly returns to its original shape, ensuring consistent comfort and support for years to come.

**Ergonomic Curved Design – A "Warm Hug" for Your Body**
Designed with your comfort in mind, the chair features an ergonomic curved backrest that follows the natural line of your body. It gently supports your back, hips, and legs, creating a relaxed, pressure-free sitting position that feels like a warm hug. Whether you’re sitting upright to work or leaning back to unwind, this chair adapts to your body, reducing strain and enhancing relaxation.

**Versatile Style for Every Room**
Perfect for any space, the Cloud Chair seamlessly fits into living rooms, bedrooms, student dorms, or playrooms. Its timeless design complements any interior style – from modern minimalism to cozy bohemian – and offers a cozy spot to chill, work, read, or rest. Whether you need extra seating for guests or a personal retreat, this chair is the ideal addition to your home.

Experience the simple nirvana of comfort and convenience with the Cloud Chair – where effortless setup, premium materials, and thoughtful design come together to redefine relaxation. Order yours today and transform any room into a haven of comfort!

【Ergonomic Curved Shape】 The curved backrest follows the natural body line and supports the back, hips and legs like a "warm hug" – for a relaxed, pressure-free sitting position.
【Versatile in Every Room】 Ideal for living rooms, bedrooms, student rooms or playrooms. Fits any interior style and offers a cozy place to chill, work or rest.

products.description: 3-IN-1 DESIGN: This mattress can be used in 3 ways: as a floor chair, as a daybed, and as a foldable sofa bed. Use it as extra seating to watch TV, play, or take a short nap. ADJUSTABLE BACKREST: This floor lounger has a 5-level adjustable backrest that can be tilted from 105° to 180° to adapt to your personal lying habits.
products.detailHtml:
Transform Your Living Space with Our Versatile 3-in-1 Floor Chair Sofa Bed!

Tired of cluttered furniture that doesn’t multitask? Meet our 3-in-1 Design Floor Lounger—your ultimate solution for maximizing comfort and functionality in any room. This innovative piece seamlessly transitions between three essential modes to fit your every need:

- **Floor Chair**: Perfect for cozy TV nights, gaming sessions, or casual conversations. Sink into its supportive design while enjoying your favorite activities.
- **Daybed**: Unfold it to create a relaxing spot for afternoon naps or reading, offering a comfortable surface to stretch out and unwind.
- **Foldable Sofa Bed**: Host overnight guests with ease! Convert it into a spacious bed that provides a restful sleep experience, ideal for small apartments or unexpected visitors.

Customize Your Comfort with 5-Level Adjustable Backrest
Whether you prefer upright support for working, a gentle recline for reading, or a flat surface for sleeping, our floor lounger has you covered. The adjustable backrest features 5 levels, tilting from 105° to 180°, so you can find the perfect angle to match your personal lying habits. Say goodbye to stiff, one-size-fits-all seating and hello to personalized relaxation!

Breathable Linen Fabric & Thick Padding for Unmatched Comfort
Designed with your comfort in mind, both the backrest and seat are generously padded with high-density foam, ensuring a plush feel that cushions your body after a long, strenuous day. The breathable linen fabric cover enhances airflow, keeping you cool and comfortable even during extended use. It’s soft to the touch, durable, and easy to clean—perfect for daily living.

Stable Steel Frame & Space-Saving Design
Built to last, the inner steel frame provides exceptional stability, supporting up to 120 kg without wobbling or sagging. When not in use, its compact design allows for easy storage—simply fold it up and tuck it away in a closet, under a bed, or in a corner, saving valuable floor space in your home.

Product Details:
- **Chair Dimensions**: 61W x 73D x 58H cm (perfect for compact spaces)
- **Bed Dimensions**: 61W x 210D x 11H cm (spacious enough for a restful night’s sleep)
- **Weight Capacity**: 120 kg (sturdy support for most adults)
- **Assembly**: No tools required! Unfold and use immediately—no hassle, no waiting.

Upgrade your home with a piece that adapts to your lifestyle. Whether you need extra seating, a nap spot, or a guest bed, our 3-in-1 Floor Chair Sofa Bed delivers versatility, comfort, and style. Order now and experience the convenience of furniture that works as hard as you do!

STABLE & SPACE-SAVING: The inner steel frame ensures high stability and the compact design allows for particularly space-saving storage.

products.detailHtml:
Introducing Our Modular Cloud Chair – The Epitome of Effortless Comfort and Style!

Say goodbye to the hassle of furniture assembly with our innovative modular cloud chair! Designed for ultimate convenience, this chair requires **no assembly** at all. Simply unpack the parts, gently tap and arrange them to enhance their elasticity, and let the chair fully recover—this process may take up to 72 hours, ensuring it reaches its optimal shape for your comfort. Sit back, relax, and embrace the "simple nirvana" of a ready-to-use chair without a single tool or instruction manual needed!

Crafted with **premium chenille fabric**, this chair is a feast for the senses. The high-quality material is exceptionally soft to the touch, yet incredibly durable and breathable, making it perfect for long hours of use. Free from harmful chemicals, it adds a touch of elegance to any space while resisting everyday wear and unsightly pilling, ensuring it stays looking fresh and luxurious for years to come.

Beneath the sumptuous fabric lies **high-density, highly elastic foam** that redefines comfort. This specialized foam provides optimal support for your body, cradling you in cloud-like softness whether you’re unwinding after a long day, playing with the kids, or diving into a good book. Even after prolonged use, it instantly returns to its original shape, maintaining that perfect balance of support and plushness you’ll love.

Designed with your body in mind, the **ergonomic curved backrest** follows the natural line of your spine, delivering a "warm hug" of support to your back, hips, and legs. This thoughtful design promotes a relaxed, pressure-free seating position, reducing strain and ensuring you stay comfortable even during extended sessions. Whether you’re working from home, binge-watching your favorite show, or simply taking a moment to breathe, this chair adapts to your body’s needs.

Versatility is key, and this chair fits seamlessly into **every room** of your home. Ideal for living rooms, bedrooms, student dorms, or playrooms, it complements any interior style—from modern minimalism to cozy bohemian. Create a cozy corner to chill, a productive workspace, or a restful nook—this chair does it all, making it the perfect addition to any space where comfort and style matter.

Elevate your daily moments with the modular cloud chair—where convenience, luxury, and comfort come together in one stunning package. Order yours today and experience the difference!
features: 【Perfect Comfort with High-Density Elastic Foam】 Filled with high-density, highly elastic elastic foam. Provides optimal support and cloud-soft comfort, instantly returning to its original shape even after prolonged use – perfect for relaxing, playing or reading.
【Ergonomic Curved Design】 The curved backrest follows the natural body line and supports the back, hips, and legs like a "warm hug" – for a relaxed, pressure-free seating position.
【Versatile in Every Room】 Ideal for living rooms, bedrooms, student rooms or playrooms. Fits any interior style and provides a cozy place to chill, work or rest.

products.description: Space-saving & portable: This floor sofa with sleeping function can be easily folded up and stored compactly, so it fits perfectly in corners and optimally uses the available space. Ideal for apartments, student dormitories, family rooms or when traveling. Multifunctional: Our sofa bed is a versatile piece of furniture - it serves both as a two-seater sofa for additional seating and as a comfortable guest mattress for one person, ideal for overnight guests or for relaxing.
products.detailHtml:
Introducing our versatile Floor Sofa with Sleeping Function – the ultimate solution for maximizing space without compromising on comfort or style! Perfect for modern living spaces, this innovative piece of furniture seamlessly blends functionality and convenience, making it a must-have for apartments, student dormitories, family rooms, or even travel adventures.

Designed with space-saving in mind, this floor sofa can be easily folded up into a compact size, allowing it to fit perfectly into corners or small spaces when not in use. Say goodbye to bulky furniture that takes up valuable room – our sofa optimizes every inch of your living area, ensuring you have more space to move and enjoy.

What truly sets this sofa apart is its incredible multifunctionality. By day, it serves as a cozy two-seater sofa, providing ample seating for you, your family, or guests. When the need arises – whether for overnight visitors, a lazy afternoon nap, or simply relaxing – it effortlessly transforms into a comfortable single-person guest mattress. No more struggling with uncomfortable air mattresses or makeshift beds; your guests will appreciate the supportive, restful sleep this sofa bed provides.

Comfort is at the heart of our design. The sofa features thick, high-density padding that offers exceptional support for your body, ensuring you can sit or lie down for hours without discomfort. The breathable fabric cover, crafted with a luxurious linen feel, adds an extra layer of softness while promoting air circulation to keep you cool and comfortable all year round. Whether you’re watching a movie, reading a book, or taking a nap, this sofa bed guarantees a relaxing experience.

We understand that keeping furniture clean can be a hassle, which is why we’ve equipped this sofa with a removable cover. Simply unzip and remove the cover for easy cleaning – whether you need to spot-treat a spill or throw it in the washing machine for a deep clean. This ensures your sofa always looks fresh, hygienic, and ready for use, no matter how much it’s loved.

Product Information:
- Overall Dimensions: 138W x 80D x 50H cm (spacious enough for two people to sit or one person to sleep comfortably)
- Load Capacity: 250 kg (sturdy and durable to support daily use)
- No Assembly Required: Unfold and enjoy immediately – no tools or complicated setup needed!

Upgrade your living space with a furniture piece that adapts to your needs. Our Floor Sofa with Sleeping Function is more than just a sofa – it’s a space-saving, multifunctional, and supremely comfortable addition to any home. Order yours today and experience the perfect blend of convenience, style, and comfort!
features: High comfort: Equipped with thick padding, this floor sofa offers excellent comfort and ensures optimal body support. The breathable fabric cover with a linen feel adds an additional layer of comfort, making it the perfect choice for relaxation.
Removable Cover: The cover of the sofa bed can be easily removed and cleaned, creating a fresh and hygienic seating or sleeping environment.

This spacious relaxation paradise is perfect for unwinding in any room of your home or office. Whether you're cuddling with a loved one, taking a peaceful nap, diving into a good book, or even playing games, its roomy design ensures you have plenty of space to stretch out. The non-slip rubber dots on the base provide exceptional stability, so you can enjoy your downtime without worrying about slips or slides, making it ideal for the living room, bedroom, or even your workspace.

Setting up your new comfort haven is a breeze with our easy installation process. Simply open the vacuum bag, place the iron frame correctly into the fabric cover following the included instructions, and allow 72 hours for the bed to fully restore its shape. For faster expansion, gently tapping and shaking the bed helps the sponge fluff up to its maximum plushness, ensuring you can start relaxing in no time.

What truly sets this bed apart is its 5-stage adjustable backrest, offering customizable comfort at your fingertips. Fold, lock, and relax—effortlessly adjust the backrest from 90° to 180° to suit any activity. Sit upright for gaming or working, recline for reading or watching TV, or lie flat for a restful night’s sleep. The secure lock mechanism keeps the backrest stable in your chosen position, letting you find your perfect comfort spot in seconds.

More than just a floor cushion, this multi-functional piece transforms to fit your lifestyle. Use it as a sofa bed for overnight guests, a cozy pet bed for your furry friends, a play seat for kids, or a nap mat for quick snoozes. Take it outside for picnics, set it up in the living room for movie nights, or create a cozy corner in your bedroom—the possibilities are endless. Embrace comfort, versatility, and style with a bed that adapts to *you*.

products.detailHtml:
Introducing the Cloud Chair – the epitome of hassle-free comfort and versatile style, designed to elevate your relaxation experience in every corner of your home.

**No Assembly Required: Unbox and Unwind Instantly**
Say goodbye to the frustration of complicated furniture assembly! Our modular Cloud Chair arrives ready to use—simply unpack all the parts, gently tap and arrange them to enhance elasticity, and let the chair fully recover (which may take up to 72 hours). Once settled, you’ll be greeted by a cozy haven without a single tool or confusing instruction manual. It’s relaxation reimagined, simplified for your convenience.

**Premium Chenille Fabric: Softness Meets Durability**
Crafted with high-quality chenille fabric, this chair offers an incredibly soft, velvety touch that feels luxurious against your skin. Not only is it gentle and breathable, but it’s also free from harmful chemicals, ensuring safe use for you and your family. Designed to resist wear and pilling, this fabric maintains its elegance and smooth texture even with daily use, adding a touch of sophistication to any room decor—whether modern, minimalist, or cozy.

**High-Density Elastic Foam: Cloud-Like Comfort That Lasts**
Sink into pure comfort with the chair’s high-density, highly elastic foam filling. Engineered to provide optimal support, it cradles your body in a cloud-like embrace, adapting to your movements while retaining its shape even after prolonged use. Whether you’re binge-watching your favorite show, diving into a good book, or simply unwinding after a long day, this foam ensures consistent comfort that never sags—making it the perfect spot for relaxation, play, or focused work.

**Ergonomic Curved Shape: A “Warm Hug” for Your Body**
Designed with your well-being in mind, the Cloud Chair features an ergonomic curved backrest that follows the natural line of your body. It gently supports your back, hips, and legs, creating a relaxed, pressure-free sitting position that feels like a “warm hug.” Whether you’re sitting upright or leaning back, the chair promotes proper posture, reducing strain and enhancing comfort for hours on end.

**Versatile in Every Room: Your Go-To Cozy Spot**
From living rooms and bedrooms to student dorms and playrooms, the Cloud Chair seamlessly fits into any space. Its sleek, adaptable design complements any interior style, making it a versatile addition to your home. Use it as a cozy reading nook, a casual workspace, or a playtime spot for kids—the possibilities are endless. Wherever you place it, it becomes the ultimate destination for chilling, working, or resting.

Experience the perfect blend of comfort, convenience, and style with the Cloud Chair. Unbox, relax, and let every moment in this chair feel like a retreat. Upgrade your space today!

For faster results, gently tap each part to accelerate elasticity and fluffiness, ensuring you can sink into comfort in no time.

**Spacious & Inviting Design**
Measuring 137 cm (W) × 175 cm (D) × 63 cm (H), this chaise longue offers generous space to stretch out, curl up, or unwind however you please. Whether you’re binge-watching your favorite series, diving into a good book, or taking a peaceful nap, its roomy dimensions provide the perfect spot for total relaxation.

**Luxurious Corduroy Fabric**
Crafted from high-quality corduroy, the lounger boasts a soft, skin-friendly texture that adds a touch of sophistication to any room. Durable and easy to clean, this exclusive fabric ensures long-lasting beauty and practicality, making it ideal for daily use.

**Exceptional Support & Durability**
Filled with high-density memory foam, the lounger strikes the perfect balance between supportive firmness and cloud-like softness. Its stable structure and impressive load-bearing capacity prevent sagging, guaranteeing consistent comfort and durability for years to come. Enjoy a seating experience that remains cozy and supportive, no matter how often you use it.

**Ergonomic Comfort & Versatility**
Designed with your well-being in mind, this modern chaise longue features an ergonomic shape and four removable, washable cushions that provide targeted support for your back, neck, and lumbar spine. The 26 cm wide armrests gently wrap around your arms, while plush padding envelopes you in luxurious softness, melting away stress and relieving discomfort. Whether as a reading nook, movie spot, or nap retreat, it’s your daily escape to relaxation.

Elevate your home with a lounger that combines style, comfort, and functionality—order yours today and experience the ultimate in relaxation!

After unpacking, please let the sofa rest for about 72 hours according to the instructions and shape the details of the sofa by pressing the cushions together so that they regain their original shape. Designed for life: With its rounded edges and elegant, inviting appearance, this luxurious sofa set is not only aesthetically appealing but also soft and durable, featuring extra-wide seats. It is the perfect place to enjoy movies or relax with family or friends.
products.detailHtml:
Experience unparalleled convenience and comfort with our luxurious modular sofa set, meticulously designed to elevate your living space while simplifying your daily life.

**Setup Made Effortless** – No assembly required! Simply unpack your sofa set and let it rest for approximately 72 hours as instructed. Gently press the cushions together to help them regain their original shape, and your new lounge area will be ready to enjoy in no time.

**Designed for Life’s Moments** – Crafted with rounded edges and an elegant, inviting appearance, this sofa set seamlessly blends aesthetics with functionality. Sink into the soft, durable upholstery and extra-wide seats, perfect for cozy movie nights, lazy afternoons, or quality time with family and friends. Its timeless design adds a touch of luxury to any room, making it a focal point that complements your decor.

**Sleek, Timeless Style** – Featuring clean lines and a minimalist cord cover, this modular sofa brings a chic, contemporary look to your home. Whether your space is modern, traditional, or somewhere in between, its understated elegance ensures it remains a stylish centerpiece for years to come.

**Flexible and Easy to Move** – Each piece of the modular set can be moved individually, making it ideal for navigating tight hallways, narrow doors, or rearranging your space. No more stress during moves or room makeovers—this sofa adapts to your needs effortlessly.

**Versatile for Every Space** – From spacious living rooms and cozy apartments to bedrooms, guest rooms, or even children’s play areas, this sofa fits seamlessly into any environment. Kids will love jumping and playing on its sturdy, supportive surface, and it’s even perfect for utilizing attic spaces without wasting an inch of potential.

Elevate your home with a sofa that combines style, durability, and unmatched versatility. Whether you’re relaxing alone or hosting guests, this modular set is designed to make every moment at home more comfortable and enjoyable.
features: Convenient lounge area: This modular sofa with cord cover features a simple style that focuses on clean lines, giving your home a timeless and chic look.
Easy to move: The sofas can be moved individually, making them ideal for difficult hallways or narrow doors. No worries when moving.
Versatile use: Perfect for living rooms, apartments, bedrooms, guest rooms, children's rooms, and children can jump on it. No space in the attic is wasted.
